name: cortex-query-analytics-logs

outputs.description: Unique identifier for the Traps agent. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.OsType Operating system of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.AgentID

outputs.description: Indicates whether the endpoint is a virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI). Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.OSVersion Full version number of the operating system running on the endpoint. For example, 6.1.7601.19135.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.IsVdi

outputs.description: Indicates whether the endpoint is running a 64-bit version of Windows. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.AgentIP IP address of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.Is64

outputs.description: Hostname of the endpoint on which the event was logged. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.DeviceDomain Domain to which the endpoint belongs.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.DeviceName

outputs.description: The username on which the event was logged. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.UserDomain Username of the active user on the endpoint.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.Username

outputs.description: Universal Time Coordinated (UTC) equivalent of the time at which an agent logged an event. ISO-8601 string representation. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.AgentVersion Version of the Traps agent.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.AgentTime

outputs.description: Status of the Traps protection. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.DataCollectionStatus Status of the agent logging.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EndPointHeader.ProtectionStatus

outputs.description: Tenant external ID. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.EventType Subtype of event.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.TrapsID

outputs.description: Event unique ID. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.GeneratedTime Universal Time Coordinated (UTC) equivalent of the time at which an event was logged. For agent events, this represents the time on the endpoint. For policy, configuration, and system events, this represents the time on the Traps management service. ISO-8601 string representation (for example, 2017-01-24T09:08:59Z).
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.UUID

outputs.description: ID of the Traps management service region. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.OriginalAgentTime Original timestamp for endpoint.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.RegionID

outputs.description: The Traps system component that initiated the event, for example TrapsAgent, TrapsServiceCore, TrapsServiceManagement, TrapsServiceBackend. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.type Type of file.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.Facility

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.FileName File name, without the path or the file type extension.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.SHA256

outputs.description: Full path, aligned with OS format. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.FileSize Size of the file in bytes.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.FilePath

outputs.description: Whether the file was reported. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.Blocked Whether the file was blocked.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.Reported

outputs.description: Trusted signer result. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.LocalAnalysisResult.Publishers File publisher.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.LocalAnalysisResult.Trusted

outputs.description: Trusted ID. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.ExecutionCount File execution count.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.LocalAnalysisResult.TrustedID

outputs.description: The date the file was last seen. Cortex.Logging.Analytics.Severity The threat severity.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Analytics.MessageData.LastSeen

outputs.description: The hostname that is mapped to this endpoint. Endpoint.IPAddress The IP address of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.Hostname

outputs.description: The domain of the endpoint. Endpoint.OSVersion OS version.
outputs.name: Endpoint.Domain

outputs.description: Endpoint OS. Endpoint.ID The unique ID within the tool retrieving the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.OS

outputs.description: The name of the host. Host.IPAddress The IP address of the host.
outputs.name: Host.Hostname

outputs.description: The domain of the host. Host.OSVersion The OS version of the host.
outputs.name: Host.Domain

outputs.description: Host OS. Host.ID The unique ID within the tool retrieving the host.
outputs.name: Host.OS

outputs.description: The full file name (including file extension). File.Type The file type, as determined by libmagic (same as displayed in file entries).
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: The path where the file is located. File.Size The size of the file in bytes.
outputs.name: File.Path

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file. File.DigitalSignature.Publisher The publisher of the digital signature for the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The name of the company that released a binary.
outputs.name: File.Company
